Container.Name: Homelable-Frontend
Container.Overview:
Frontend for Homelable — a self-hosted infrastructure visualization solution. Displays your homelab as an interactive canvas with network scanning, live healthchecks, and customizable node designs.
Install Homelable-Backend first, then this container. Both containers must use the same custom Docker network (homelable).
Open the WebUI on port 3000 and log in with the credentials configured in Homelable-Backend.
Container.Requires: Homelable-Backend must be running on the same "homelable" Docker network.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Homelable web interface.
